title: Bornmuellera tymphaea
taxonomy: Bornmuellera tymphaea is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. It is native to Greece and the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is classified as part of the genus Bornmuellera, which is a group of flowering plants closely related to the genera Alyssum and Alyssoides. Bornmuellera tymphaea is further classified as a member of the order Brassicales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
